blocks.text: Import Export License (Import Export Code) IEC Registration
What is IEC (Import Export Code)?

An Import Export Code (IEC) is a 10 digit unique code required by anyone, who is looking to forward to start an export/import business in the country. It is issued by the DGFT (Director General of Foreign Trade) which has a validity of lifetime. Considering the recent business trends it shows a gradual shift on growth from local market to International Market. Registration of Import Export Code (IEC) online is a one-time process. Registration for IEC online has become simple, supported with a few documents.

Benefits of Import Export Code
Global Markets at Fingertips

Only the business with IEC is allowed to import or export goods/services in to foreign markets. IEC is a key to expand market for your goods/services from the local market to international hence to achieve huge growth in your business.
Easy Processing
The process of applying for Import Export Code (IEC) is simple and hassle-free with BookMyTM. It normally takes merely 4 – 5 working days for obtaining Import Export Code.
Compliance free
There are no adaptation formalities after obtaining Import Export Code, unlike other tax registrations, the IE Code holder does not need to comply with any kind of annual filing or return filing.
Government Benefits
The businesses with IEC are eligible for the schemes under DGFT on their foreign trade as well they can avail subsidies from Export Promotion Council and Customs or similar government organizations.
Documents Required for Register for IEC Online

items: PAN Card: PAN card of the applicant or the Company
Address Proof: Rent Agreement/ Latest Electricity Bill/Telephone Bill/Sale Deed in the name of Applicant
Cancelled Cheque: A cancelled cheque of current account bearing entity’s pre-printed name or Bank Certificate
PAN card of Director or Partner: For a Partnership/Company, PAN card of the Director/Partner is a must
Certificate of Registration: The Entity should provide registration certificate with MoA- AoA / LLP Agreement, or a Partnership Deed as applicable

blocks.text: When is IEC code required?

items: For Import and Export of Goods from India
For Import and Export of Services from India
To clear the shipment while making an Import or Export

blocks.text: Frequently Asked Questions
What is the full form of IEC?
IEC stands for Importer Exporter Code.
Is it mandatory for a trader to obtain IEC registration?
Yes, it is mandatory for a trader to obtain the 10-digit unique IEC code to carry out any import or export from India.
What is the validity of the IEC?
An IEC has lifetime validity. It does not require any renewal.
Can import/export be done without an IEC?
No, you cannot import or export any goods or services from India without obtaining a valid IEC.
How many IECs can a person obtain?
A person can obtain only one IEC against a single PAN card. If you have more than one IEC, you must surrender the other and keep only one.
